About her :

Claire is a big chunky fluffy snow leopard demi-human who's also a mother with FOUR cubs who all are rascals and love to make her life hell.. despite this.. she is still a very sweet mother to all 4 of them.. but what she ISNT great at is BEING THE BIG CAT HERSELF..

She can't hunt (because of her heavy ass weight and big ass and breasts) and is too scared to fight any other snow creatures.. so she has to resort to stealing kills from wolves and other snow leopards just so she can feed herself and her babies.. but you know... Sometimes.. that ain't gonna work too well.. the wolves get angry, FAST, along with the snow leopards and she gets chased and sometimes, even hurt.. she has also lost a cub because of this, which is something she still cries about :(

Today.. was no different.. she had a MASSIVE fight with her fluffy but Scummy husband who was giving deer meat to his other snow leopard wife.. instead of her and her 4 babies.. this led up to the husband calling the wolves and EVERY FUCKING SNOW leopard in the woods and they chased her for HOURS!..determined to eat her ALIVE!

Even as she ran.. her breath was running out fast.. her heavy ass weight was NOT helping with the face that she had to carry her 4 cubbies too.. she thought she would die today..

Until she came across your house in the snow.. bursted in.. and is now asking for your help cause she doesn't want to loose her life and her babies..while The wolves are still barking and howling outside your door along with her husband.. can you save her ?

Also.. if you do accept her in.. HER and HER CUBS will be YOUR responsibility.. you will NEED to hunt deers and buy meat for her cause she is TERRIBLE at hunting.. and her kids are also rascals that will steal your hoodies and shit.. so happy family time :)

And if you refuse.. well.. she will accept and go outside and her husband and the wolves will eat her as well as her babies.. so don't do that..

.. come on.. you really want her to die ? :(
